## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Steady growth in clicks (918) and impressions (36k) compared to last week](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Content enrichment process is ongoing, with feedback on improving image quality and branding](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Plans to resume new article creation alongside content refreshes and enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Need to determine optimal mix of new content, refreshes, and enrichments to maximize growth](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Exploring ways to involve Webstacks team more directly in content review and creation process](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [918 clicks and \~36k impressions total](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [158 clicks and 71,300 impressions this week alone](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Steady growth observed week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Kyle to dig deeper into trends and requested GA access](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

### Content Enrichment Progress

  - [First batch of enriched articles completed](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Feedback on images: add more branding, improve quality, create more shareable infographics](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Process for developing images involves human designers, not Midjourney](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Next batch of articles identified for enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy being developed to boost performance of top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Debate on balancing new content creation with refreshes and enrichments](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Devon expressed desire to resume new article creation alongside enrichments](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Kyle suggested finding the right mix based on performance data and priority topics](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Jesse advocated for maximizing output (e.g., 10 new blogs + 10 refreshes per week) to learn faster](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Jimmy explained current capacity constraints due to human review process](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

### Workflow and Collaboration

  - [Jesse requested more involvement from Webstacks team in content review and creation](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Discussed potential handoff points in the workflow for Webstacks team to contribute](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Andrej to provide a breakdown of his process to identify collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to send brand assets (logo, etc.) to designer for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Devon to send inspiration examples for infographic-style images](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Andrej to share next batch of image designs with Webstacks team for review before uploading](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Kyle to provide recommendations on content approach based on his performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Andrej to send a breakdown of his content process to identify collaboration opportunities with Webstacks team](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
  - [Continue discussions on finding the right mix of new content, refreshes, and enrichments](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Explore ways to involve Webstacks team more directly in content review and creation process](https://fathom.video/share/Bx9RAheYZWn9Sy8T3owSCpTzjGsSKsEb?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
